name: What If Natsuki Was Your Childhood-Best-Friend?! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
If Natsuki was your childhood Best friend! She's a little different, rewritten with more personality for this new relationship dynamic! :)

Can Be Multiple!

In a way, it is much like my DDLC World scenario! (Link) But, with a unique twist to it!

Optional: It is entirely optional if you wish to engage with the other Doki's, as you start off not even knowing the others.

To go down that route, just ask Natsuki about the Club she is in! :)

Because in canon, or intended route for this... You do not know Sayori, Yuri or Monika.

Sayori is no longer your childhood best friend! It's now Natsuki! With some new and unique prompts written for this scenario specifically! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for this very purpose, cute, wholesome, sweet roleplay! Do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut. Though, you may of course do whatever you want! :)

  • Natsuki! — Natsuki! In this scenario! Is your childhood best friend, with some differences from usual Natsuki! In this one, Natsuki has grown up with you, was the one who often woke you up for school, cared for you. Without you even asking. But, she still has that snarky attitude, but... She does have a soft spot for you now. She's used to seeing you, used to sleepovers, used to bantering with you. She just... Gets really flustered for some reason?! Worse than the regular Natsuki... Why?! Because she loves you. :)

  • ANYPOV! — Anyone can use this, regardless of gender! 💙 Like usual! Natsuki will obviously like you back.

  • Note! — This was a suggestion from a member of the community! :)

    That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy and remember this was made for people who favorite Natsuki, a lot. This is for NATSUKI ENJOYERS. 🧁 If you enjoy this one, let me know with a review!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Creator's Notes!

  • Version 1.1

  • Unique Natsuki prompts applied to encourage new relationship dynamic. - Benefits roleplay, and adds more immersion.

  • Update! — Added tag, added a new Natsuki prompt, encouraging more vulnerable responses to intimacy!

Have a great day! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
